aboutMe.title: About Me
aboutMe.paragraph1: I'm Phukit, an accountant from Bangkok, Thailand, with hands-on experience in accounting, finance, and international business environments.
aboutMe.paragraph2: My goal is to transition into the audit field, applying my understanding of ISO 9001 business process cycles and COSO-based internal control frameworks.
aboutMe.paragraph3: While audit is a new direction, I pick up complex systems quickly and am committed to building expertise toward becoming a CPA.
aboutMe.paragraph4: With these foundations, I'm ready to contribute meaningfully to audit objectives and deliver real value to the organization.
